channel.title: Business - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

  4. The Container Store to be bought out of bankruptcy by Bed Bath & Beyond  The Business Journals
  5. The Container Store, based in Coppell, set to be acquired by Bed Bath & Beyond  Dallas News

item.title: That KitKat you're eating could be stolen property - Creative Bloq
item.description:
1. That KitKat you're eating could be stolen property  Creative Bloq
  2. How a Massive KitKat Heist Turned Into Crisis PR Gold  WSJ
  3. ‘Not a Stunt, or an April Fool’s Joke’: KitKat Ramps Up Efforts to Locate 400,000 Stolen Candy Bars  Time Magazine
  4. Almost 12 Tons of KitKat Bars Stolen in Chocolate Heist, Nestlé Says  TODAY.com
  5. Kit-napped: Viral Kit Kat heist sparks responses from brands, cities, and even a Real Housewife  The Jerusalem Post
